articles.title: The art of the heel turn is still wrestling's greatest magic trick.
articles.excerpt: It only works when the audience wants to believe the betrayal.
articles.body: A heel turn only lands when the audience has invested in the relationship first. The best turns do not just surprise us—they make us reconsider every moment that came before.

articles.title: Last night, the main event remembered how to breathe.
articles.excerpt: A match that left room for the crowd to feel every turn.
articles.body: The best main events are not built from moves alone. They are built from pacing, patience, and knowing when to let the arena speak.
